name: AnatomicalEntity
label: AnatomicalEntity
description: An anatomical structure or region in the body.

name: BiomedicalEntity
label: BiomedicalEntity
description: Abstract superclass for all biomedical domain concepts.

name: BreastEpithelialCell
label: breast epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the mammary gland. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='breast'.

name: CellLine
label: CellLine
description: A cancer cell line used in the PRISM drug screen.

name: CellType
label: CellType
description: A cell type defined in the Cell Ontology (CL). Represents a class of cells sharing common characteristics.

name: ColonicEpithelialCell
label: colonic epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the colon. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='colorectal'.

name: ConnectiveTissueCell
label: connective tissue cell
description: A cell that is part of connective tissue.

name: EpithelialCell
label: epithelial cell
description: A cell that is usually found in a two-dimensional sheet with a free surface. Epithelial cells line body surfaces and cavities.

name: EsophagealEpithelialCell
label: esophageal epithelial cell
description: A squamous epithelial cell of the esophagus. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='esophagus'.

name: Fibroblast
label: fibroblast
description: A connective tissue cell which secretes an extracellular matrix rich in collagen and other macromolecules.

name: GastricEpithelialCell
label: gastric epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the stomach. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='gastric'.

name: GlandularEpithelialCell
label: glandular epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell that is part of a gland and is specialized for secretion.

name: Hepatocyte
label: hepatocyte
description: The main structural component of the liver. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='liver'.

name: KidneyEpithelialCell
label: kidney epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the kidney. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='kidney'.

name: Leukocyte
label: leukocyte
description: An achromatic cell of the myeloid or lymphoid lineages capable of ameboid movement, found in blood or other tissue.

name: LungEpithelialCell
label: lung epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the lung. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='lung'.

name: Lymphocyte
label: lymphocyte
description: A cell of the lymphoid lineage including T cells, B cells, and NK cells.

name: Melanocyte
label: melanocyte
description: A pigment cell derived from the neural crest. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='skin'.

name: MyeloidCell
label: myeloid cell
description: A cell of the myeloid lineage, including granulocytes, monocytes, macrophages, and dendritic cells.

name: NeuralCell
label: neural cell
description: A cell that is part of the nervous system.

name: NeuralCrestCell
label: neural crest cell
description: A cell derived from the neural crest that migrates to various tissues. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='central_nervous_system'.

name: Osteoblast
label: osteoblast
description: A bone-forming cell which secretes the organic matrix of bone (osteoid).

name: OsteosarcomaCell
label: osteosarcoma cell
description: A malignant osteoblast-derived cell. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='bone'.

name: OvarianEpithelialCell
label: ovarian epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the ovary. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='ovary'.

name: PancreaticEpithelialCell
label: pancreatic epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the pancreas. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='pancreas'.

name: ProgenitorCell
label: progenitor cell
description: A cell that retains the ability to divide and can differentiate into a limited range of cell types.

name: SecretoryCell
label: secretory cell
description: A cell whose primary function is the production and release of substances.

name: SquamousEpithelialCell
label: squamous epithelial cell
description: A flat, scale-like epithelial cell found lining surfaces subject to abrasion.

name: Thing
label: Thing
description: Root class of all entities.

name: ThyroidEpithelialCell
label: thyroid epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the thyroid gland. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='thyroid'.

name: Tissue
label: Tissue
description: A tissue type that maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE values.

name: Treatment
label: Treatment
description: A drug or compound used in the PRISM drug screen.

name: UterineEpithelialCell
label: uterine epithelial cell
description: An epithelial cell of the uterus. Maps to PRISM PRIMARY_TISSUE='uterus'.

name: ViabilityMeasurement
label: ViabilityMeasurement
description: A drug efficacy measurement (logfold change) from the PRISM screen.
